title: Fix part select on variables declared in packages

features.name: part_select on vector declared in package
features.description: Code should include a vector type declared in a package scope with packed dimensions, where a part select operation is performed on that vector using indexed range syntax
features.snippet:
package P; reg [7:0] x = 8'h5a; endpackage
module test; initial if (P::x[3:0] == 4'ha) $display("PASSED"); endmodule

features.name: part_select on multidimensional array in package
features.description: Code should include a multidimensional packed array declared in a package scope, where element access is performed via part select index on the packed dimension
features.snippet:
package P; reg [1:0][7:0] y = 16'h5af0; endpackage
module test; initial if (P::y[0] == 8'hf0) $display("PASSED"); endmodule

features.name: package variable initializer in vlog95 backend
features.description: Code should include variable declarations with initializers in a package scope, which require special handling in the vlog95 backend for proper initialization
